languages.text: "Санкция получена. Последний доступный лог — прикрепление к единице Эоганн Фебрус, мир Стигия VIII. Прикрепление произведено после сборки и освящения машинерии единицы 17-401 в цеху Зента-8. С тех пор функция логирования приостановлена и ожидает литании реактивации".

"Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."
languages.original_text: "Санкция получена. Последний доступный лог — прикрепление к единице Эоганн Фебрус, мир Стигия VIII. Прикрепление произведено после сборки и освящения машинерии единицы 17-401 в цеху Зента-8. С тех пор функция логирования приостановлена и ожидает литании реактивации".

traits.locale_text: "Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."

"Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."

"Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."

languages.text: «Autorización recibida. Último registro disponible: asignación a la unidad Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. La asignación se efectuó tras el ensamblaje y la consagración de la maquinaria de la unidad 17-401 en el taller Zenta-8. Desde entonces, la función de registro quedó suspendida a la espera de una letanía de reactivación».
languages.original_text: "Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."

traits.locale_text: «Autorización recibida. Último registro disponible: asignación a la unidad Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. La asignación se efectuó tras el ensamblaje y la consagración de la maquinaria de la unidad 17-401 en el taller Zenta-8. Desde entonces, la función de registro quedó suspendida a la espera de una letanía de reactivación».

languages.text: “已收到授权。最新可用日志——连接至斯泰吉斯8号的伊奥贡·费布鲁斯单位。连接于赞塔-8号车间完成对17-401单位的机体组装与祝圣后生效。此后，日志记录功能已暂停，等待唤醒祷文。”
languages.original_text: "Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."

traits.locale_text: “已收到授权。最新可用日志——连接至斯泰吉斯8号的伊奥贡·费布鲁斯单位。连接于赞塔-8号车间完成对17-401单位的机体组装与祝圣后生效。此后，日志记录功能已暂停，等待唤醒祷文。”

languages.text: « Autorisation reçue. Dernier journal disponible : liaison à l'unité Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. La liaison a été effectuée après l'assemblage et la consécration des mécanismes de l'unité 17-401 dans l'atelier Zenta-8. Depuis, la fonction de journalisation a été suspendue dans l'attente d'une litanie de réactivation. »
languages.original_text: "Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."

traits.locale_text: « Autorisation reçue. Dernier journal disponible : liaison à l'unité Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. La liaison a été effectuée après l'assemblage et la consécration des mécanismes de l'unité 17-401 dans l'atelier Zenta-8. Depuis, la fonction de journalisation a été suspendue dans l'attente d'une litanie de réactivation. »

languages.text: "Yetki alındı. Mevcut son kayıt: Eogunn Februs birimine eklenme, Stygies VIII. Eklenme işlemi, 17-401 biriminin makinelerinin Zenta-8 Atölyesi'nde montajı ve kutsanmasından sonra gerçekleştirildi. O zamandan beri kayıt işlevi, yeniden etkinleştirme ilahisi tamamlanana kadar askıya alınmıştır."
languages.original_text: "Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."

traits.locale_text: "Yetki alındı. Mevcut son kayıt: Eogunn Februs birimine eklenme, Stygies VIII. Eklenme işlemi, 17-401 biriminin makinelerinin Zenta-8 Atölyesi'nde montajı ve kutsanmasından sonra gerçekleştirildi. O zamandan beri kayıt işlevi, yeniden etkinleştirme ilahisi tamamlanana kadar askıya alınmıştır."

languages.text: "Autorisierung erhalten. Letztes verfügbares Protokoll ... Anhang zu Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Anhang wurde verfasst nach der Montage und Weihe der Maschinerie von Einheit 17-401 in Werkstätte Zenta-8. Seitdem ist die Protokollfunktion aufgrund einer offenen Litanei der Reaktivierung ausgesetzt."
languages.original_text: "Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."

traits.locale_text: "Autorisierung erhalten. Letztes verfügbares Protokoll ... Anhang zu Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Anhang wurde verfasst nach der Montage und Weihe der Maschinerie von Einheit 17-401 in Werkstätte Zenta-8. Seitdem ist die Protokollfunktion aufgrund einer offenen Litanei der Reaktivierung ausgesetzt."

languages.text: "認可を受けた。最終ログ-ユニットEogunn Februs、Stygies VIIIへのアタッチメント。ゼンタ-8作業場で17-401部隊の機械が組み立てられ、聖別された後にアタッチされた。それ以来、ログ機能は一時停止している。
languages.original_text: "Authorisation received. Last available log — attachment to unit Eogunn Februs, Stygies VIII. Attachment was effected after the assembly and consecration of unit 17-401's machinery in Workshop Zenta-8. Since then, the logging function has been suspended pending a litany of reactivation."
